=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (16:52-16:74) TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedClass' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
  Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'RedundantTaggedClass'"

[D2] (23:52-23:74) TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedError' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
  Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'RedundantTaggedError'"

[D3] (30:56-30:80) TS377045: Identifier 'RedundantTaggedRequest' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
  Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'RedundantTaggedRequest'"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'RedundantTaggedClass'" ===

--- file:///.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// Valid usage: identifier differs from tag (no redundancy)
export class DifferentIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<DifferentIdentifier>("MyIdentifier")("MyTag", {
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// Valid usage: no identifier provided (short form)
export class NoIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<NoIdentifier>()("NoIdentifier", {
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<RedundantTaggedClass>()("RedundantTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedError (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<RedundantTaggedError>("RedundantTaggedError")("RedundantTaggedError", {
    message: Schema.String
  })
{}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedRequest (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<RedundantTaggedRequest>("RedundantTaggedRequest")("RedundantTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'RedundantTaggedError'" ===

--- file:///.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// Valid usage: identifier differs from tag (no redundancy)
export class DifferentIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<DifferentIdentifier>("MyIdentifier")("MyTag", {
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// Valid usage: no identifier provided (short form)
export class NoIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<NoIdentifier>()("NoIdentifier", {
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<RedundantTaggedClass>("RedundantTaggedClass")("RedundantTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedError (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<RedundantTaggedError>()("RedundantTaggedError", {
    message: Schema.String
  })
{}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedRequest (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<RedundantTaggedRequest>("RedundantTaggedRequest")("RedundantTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable redundantSchemaTagIdentifier for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Remove redundant identifier 'RedundantTaggedRequest'" ===

--- file:///.src/redundantSchemaTagIdentifier.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// Valid usage: identifier differs from tag (no redundancy)
export class DifferentIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<DifferentIdentifier>("MyIdentifier")("MyTag", {
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// Valid usage: no identifier provided (short form)
export class NoIdentifier extends Schema.TaggedClass<NoIdentifier>()("NoIdentifier", {
  prop: Schema.String
}) {}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedClass
  extends Schema.TaggedClass<RedundantTaggedClass>("RedundantTaggedClass")("RedundantTaggedClass", {
    prop: Schema.String
  })
{}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedError (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedError
  extends Schema.TaggedError<RedundantTaggedError>("RedundantTaggedError")("RedundantTaggedError", {
    message: Schema.String
  })
{}

// Invalid usage: identifier equals tag in TaggedRequest (redundant)
export class RedundantTaggedRequest
  extends Schema.TaggedRequest<RedundantTaggedRequest>()("RedundantTaggedRequest", {
    payload: {},
    success: Schema.Void,
    failure: Schema.Never
  })
{}
